title: Aurangabad, Maharashtra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aurangabad, Maharashtra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aurangabad is a city in Maharashtra with a population of 1,400,000. A historic city in Maharashtra, gateway to the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora caves, with a growing manufacturing sector.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
